auth_notes: Requires creating a project in Google Cloud Console, enabling the Gmail API, and configuring OAuth 2.0 credentials with specific scopes like 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.modify'.
rate_limits: 250 quota units per user per second; 1,000,000,000 quota units per day per project. Different operations consume different amounts of units (e.g., Send: 100, List: 5).
gotchas: OAuth2 tokens expire every 7 days if the Google Cloud project is in 'Testing' status; must be set to 'In Production'.
Gmail API has a strict 25MB limit for attachments; larger files must be handled via Google Drive or multipart uploads.
The 'Gmail Trigger' node in n8n uses polling by default, but the API supports real-time push notifications via Google Cloud Pub/Sub.
client_must_provide: OAuth Client ID and Client Secret
research_notes: Focuses on the Gmail native node as specified. Note that for generic SMTP/IMAP, n8n uses different nodes ('Email Read (IMAP)' and 'Send Email').

effort_recommendation.rationale: Focuses on the Gmail native node as specified. Note that for generic SMTP/IMAP, n8n uses different nodes ('Email Read (IMAP)' and 'Send Email').
